jobs.prompt: Editorial illustration of fundamental data structures — an array of neat labeled boxes arranged in a horizontal row, a vertical stack of blocks with an upward arrow showing LIFO order, a queue of nodes with arrows flowing left to right showing FIFO, and an elegant chain of linked nodes connected by curved arrows suggesting dynamic memory. Warm cream background, deep ink outlines, muted terracotta and steel-blue accents, no text in image, soft editorial illustration style with clean geometric forms and subtle paper texture.
